titleStmt.title: SII 8.441: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 441. (A.R. No. 153 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etat trailokyanirmmāṇatrāṇasaṁ hārakāraṇam [śāsanam śāśvatam] śambhoḥ kaṭhoragirivāsinaḥ svasti śakā ttam 10 500- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa vipavavaruṣam taimātam 10 5
kiraṇa puṇṇiyakālattiṟ rāyaruṭaiyār kāriyakaṟtarāna Eppulināyakkarom tirumalaināṭṭu tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟattu nallamaṅkaipākacuvāmikku ttiruppaṇi
ppuṟam tiruppaṇi naṭan=ta vara tārāpūṟuvam paṇṇikkoṭutta kiṟāmam coḻaṉvaḷanāṭu centa melūr puravu perellaiyāvatu . kiḻpāṟkellai tirumeññāṉi
puravu cen=ta cevvaikkum civappirāṉ lempalukku meṟkku teṉpāṟkellai tirukkoṭṭiyūrpuravu cen=ta cevvaikkum paramanericera centamaṅkalappuravuce
n=ta cevukkum nam vayalukkum vaṭakku meṟpāṟkellai nākarai cen=ta cūraikkuṭippuravukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai vikkiṟamanallūṟaṉ muṟaiyiṟpuravu cen=ta teṟku
Āka Icain=ta perunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa puravil Uṭkiṭai teyvatānamum tirumuḷainayinār tāṉakkāṇi cen=ta teyvatāyamum tirumuḷai Em kuṭiempa
lum ciṟukumiḻempalum kīḻaiyiḷavāttakkuṭi Empalum melaiyiḷavāttakkuṭiempalum Āṇṭiempalum ciṟṟuvaṉeriempalum kumārāttakkuṭiempa lumperiyakumiḻi
empalum taṇṭuṇiempalum taṇṭu potāṉempalum tampiempalum Āttakkuṭikkāṭuempal paṉṉiraṇṭum Uṭkiṭaiempa ma cen=ta pu
ñcaipuravum nikki cokkanārāyaṇapperumāḷ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam caṭaiyaṉempalum kollikuṭiempalum Atuṭaṉcen=ta puñcaipuravum nikki
maṟṟuṇṭākiya nilam melūrvayalum tiraṇivayalum nallamaṅkaivayalum karuvilimaṅkaivayalum veṭaṅkuṭivayalum
Itu ṭaṉcen=ta nañcai puṉcai māvaṭai maravaṭai nattam ceyttiṭal meṭu kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟum melnokki
ya maramum nidhi nikṣepa ṅkaḷum jala pāṣāṇa viniyoga cuvantiraṅkaḷum maṅkaināyakacuvāmi teyvatāyam can=ti rātittavaraikkum
tiruppaṇi naṭappittukkoḷvārākavum . Ippaṭi taṉmacātaṉap paṭṭaiyam koṭuttom maṅkaināyakacuvāmikku Eppulināyakkarom . Inta taṉmam yātāmoru
vaṉ paripālaṉampaṇṇinavarkaḷ Aṟamceytāṉ ceytāṉ Aṟaṅ kāttāṉ pāta n=ti ṟampāmaṟ ceṉṉiyiṉmel vaittu . I[ n=ta tar] mattukku Akitam [paṇṇinavarkaḷ]
keṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaiyum mātāpitāvaiyum koṉṟa toṣattile povārākavum . In=ta taṉmacātaṉap paṭṭaiyam Eḻuti kallilum cempilum veṭṭiviccukkoṭuttom . vāca vaṇai kumarapperumāḷ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 8.441 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
